title: William McNeil (Charter Oak)
text: William McNeil of Charter Oak was reported as the donor of the electric sign referenced in this pack. No further biographical detail is documented here.

title: John Campbell
text: John Campbell was appointed, alongside L. R. Belknap, to the committee responsible for attending to the sign's installation.

title: L. R. Belknap
text: L. R. Belknap was appointed, alongside John Campbell, to the committee responsible for attending to the sign's installation.

title: San Dimas Chamber of Commerce
text: The San Dimas Chamber of Commerce took the action reported in the article and was expected to bear the estimated ongoing electricity cost for the sign.

title: The Pomona Progress
text: The Pomona Progress was the newspaper that published the article transcribed and analyzed in this pack.
